title: Migrate Facts writers to StructuredFacts and add compatibility shim
description:
Council finding: WorldState has both Facts (legacy Dictionary<string, object?>) and StructuredFacts (IReadOnlyList<Fact>). Most code still reads from Facts (~360+ usages). StructuredFacts provenance metadata is never consumed — zero behavioral impact.

Migration plan:
1. Add read-side shim in WorldState.Facts getter that falls back to StructuredFacts
2. Identify all direct Facts writes (not through Builder) and migrate to StructuredFacts
3. Add [Obsolete] attribute to Facts dictionary with message pointing to StructuredFacts
4. Run with dual-write for 2 sprints
5. Remove Facts dictionary writes only after telemetry confirms zero live reads per sprint
6. Keep Facts as read-only compatibility layer indefinitely (low maintenance cost)

Referenced in: Data/Pages/council/2026-06-30-external-audits-council.md
Audit source: Audit B
